/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/solar_sym.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solar_sym.dir/src/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solar_sym.dir/src/object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solar_sym.dir/src/rendering.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solar_sym.dir/src/scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solar_sym.dir/src/load.cpp.o -o solar_sym  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1
